text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, November 24. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
